All core features tested: client login, admin login, ticket viewing, grouped admin view, attachment display with PDF icon and download button.

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF download fix verified in iteration 158. The blob-based download in Support.js correctly saves files with extension from att.file_name. Cloudinary storage strips extension from public_id for raw files to avoid ACL blocks. Test ticket 'qwe' (ID: 699c7eb2c8fa4bf3cfa789bb) has test_document.pdf attachment. Admin grouped ticket view working with 51 clients and 100 tickets.
deployment_readiness: READY FOR DEPLOYMENT - PDF download fix verified
